frame_note: Welfare-state political economy selects skill mix of migrants and transfer policy jointly — fiscal sign is equilibrium object, not exogenous immigrant trait.

parameter_claims.value_text: Skilled, unskilled, retirees vote on tax rate + migrant skill composition + migrant count
parameter_claims.notes: Fiscal impact depends on policy response — not static NAS cell

parameter_claims.value_text: Migrants arrive young; birth rate exceeds native — affects intergenerational redistribution
parameter_claims.notes: Descendant path endogenous to political equilibrium

parameter_claims.value_text: Generous welfare states attract lower-skilled migrants — fiscal burden endogenous to magnet policy
parameter_claims.notes: US state heterogeneity partial analog via Medicaid/RPP stage5

parameter_claims.population: Recent immigration surge scenario, federal budget
parameter_claims.notes: Surge-specific federal ledger — not Mexico <HS lifetime NPV

parameter_claims.population: Added residents from surge, state/local direct costs 2023
parameter_claims.notes: Official split: federal+ vs state/local− for same surge
Tax paid floor — political argument uses without benefit side
Magnet/policy variation across destinations — Razin mechanism partial US analog

generators.name: Federal vs state-local ledger split enforcer
generators.prompt: For any surge-era fiscal claim: tag FEDERAL (CBO 60569) or STATE_LOCAL (61256) or LIFETIME_NPV (NAS). Reject synthesis that sums unlike ledgers. Report both signs explicitly.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked using CBO federal $897B surplus to dismiss NYC $3.7B shelter and state/local $9.2B costs before sweep 3.
generators.negative_space: One government budget — federal gains settle local costs.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: Federal transfers fully offset state/local shocks

generators.name: Welfare magnet destination sort
generators.prompt: Rank states by medicaid_total_computable per capita × immigrant PUMA weights by origin. Test if high-Medicaid states attract disproportionate Mexico-origin share vs BEA RPP-adjusted prediction.
generators.retrodiction: Would have connected Razin magnet theory to stage5 Medicaid heterogeneity and Saiz destination sorting before treating fiscal sign as immigrant-fixed.
generators.negative_space: Immigrant fiscal type independent of destination policy environment.

generators.name: Tax-paid floor without benefit ceiling
generators.prompt: When citing ITEP undocumented taxes: always pair with transfer receipt proxy from SIPP cells for same legal-status band. Compute taxes/benefits ratio — flag one-sided advocacy.
generators.retrodiction: Would have blocked 'immigrants pay $96.7B taxes' rhetoric without SIPP transfer_outflow in same sentence.
generators.negative_space: Tax contributions cited as net fiscal verdict.

generators.name: Political equilibrium skill-mix shift
generators.prompt: From Razin w15597: list three voter blocs and policy instruments. Map to US LPR mix by class (DHS xlsx) — does family vs employment share predict education bucket shift over time?
generators.retrodiction: Would have linked legal-path mix (cluster J) to education composition (cluster D) via political-economy mechanism before static NAS weights.
generators.negative_space: Immigrant skill mix exogenous to US policy.
unnamed_assumptions_surfaced: US approximates median-voter welfare state model
LPR class maps to skill on arrival

theories_tested.theory: CBO federal and state-local signs oppose for surge
theories_tested.prediction: federal deficit effect negative (improvement) AND state_local direct cost positive
theories_tested.duckdb_test: Manual — CBO 60569 vs 61256 headline numbers in parameter_claims
theories_tested.falsifier: Both same sign in official CBO — layer fight collapses

theories_tested.theory: ITEP tax floor exceeds Mexico federal net × stock
theories_tested.falsifier: Mexico-scaled federal proxy larger — ITEP not binding for origin debate

theories_tested.theory: High-Medicaid states overweight Mexico PUMA mass
theories_tested.duckdb_test: JOIN state_stage5_context with origin PUMA weights by state_fips
theories_tested.falsifier: Null or negative — magnet sort weak in ACS cross-section
